writing.partTitle: Part 1: Write a Sentence Based on a Picture
writing.instructions: In this part of the test, you will write ONE sentence that is based on the picture. With each picture, you will be given two words or phrases. You must use these words or phrases in your sentence. You can change the forms of the words and you can use the words in any order. Your sentences will be scored on the appropriate use of grammar and the relevance of the sentence to the picture.

writing.partTitle: Part 2: Respond to a Written Request
writing.instructions: In this part of the test, you will show how well you can write a response to an email. Your response will be scored on the quality and variety of your sentences, vocabulary, and organization. You will have 10 minutes to read and answer each email.

questions.text:
From: Karen Vance (kvance@apexcorp.com)
To: Project Team
Subject: Rescheduling Project Update Meeting

Dear Team,

Due to an urgent, unexpected client emergency, I need to postpone our project update meeting originally scheduled for tomorrow morning at 10:00 AM.

Please reply with your suggestions for rescheduling. Let me know when you are available later this week and what specific progress updates you will have ready to share at that time.

Best regards,

Karen Vance
Project Manager
Apex Corp

From: HR Department (hr@globalconsulting.com)
To: All Employees
Subject: Feedback on Proposed Hybrid Work Policy

Dear Staff,

As we finalize our new hybrid work policy for the upcoming quarter, we are gathering feedback regarding employee preferences. We want to balance team collaboration with individual flexibility.

Please reply to this email outlining your preferred arrangement (number of days in the office versus remote work) and explain how this setup will support your overall productivity.

Sincerely,

Human Resources Department
Global Consulting

writing.instructions: In this part of the test, you will write an essay in response to a prompt that asks you to state, explain, and support your opinion on an issue. Typically, an effective essay will contain a minimum of 300 words. Your essay will be scored on whether your opinion is supported with reasons and/or examples, and on the quality and variety of your sentences, vocabulary, and organization.

questions.text: Some companies believe that providing regular professional development training is the most effective way to retain valuable employees. Others believe that offering regular financial bonuses and promotions is more effective. Which of these two approaches do you believe is more successful for long-term employee retention? Give specific reasons and examples to support your position.
